meaning: n.法国 Camembert 村所产的软质乳酪
examples: Meat : Beef, duck and game. Cheeses : Sheddar, Comté, brebis, camembert.
Soft cheeses, like Camembert, should be stored in waxed cheese paper or baking paper.
It goes without saying that no French intellectual worth his Camembert would be so concerned.
If there were a royal court of cheese, camembert would unquestionably be queen.
